haiku45.summary_excerpt: Python script is well-structured (type hints, error handling, TDD-commented rounds) but deliverable is critically incomplete: (1) fixture files (fixtures/package.json, requirements.txt, mock_licenses.json, config.json) not provided; (2) act-result.txt artifact MUST exist per requirements — missing; (3) no evidence of actionlint validation or act execution; (4) workflow references test_license_checker.py but tests not shown (unclear if completed); (5) --db flag hardcoded default may fail in execu

gemini31pro.summary_excerpt: High-quality TDD implementation with excellent modularity and type safety. The Python script handles multiple formats gracefully. Workflow is robust, featuring least-privilege permissions and thorough testing (including self-validation via actionlint). Pragmatic and idiomatic throughout.
